error_signature: opens the relevant page when clicking bookmark icon
title: Bookmark icon opens page instead of just bookmarking
symptom: Clicking the bookmark icon not only bookmarks the item but also opens the relevant page, which is unintended behavior.
applies_when: Using a clickable card with an open-on-click action
Bookmark icon is nested within the card
not_this_if: Bookmark icon is not nested within a clickable card
root_cause: The default behavior of the clickable card is to open a new page on click. When the bookmark icon is clicked, the event propagates to the card, triggering the page opening action instead of just executing the bookmark action.
fix_steps: Select the bookmark button in the card
agent_instruction: Implement `event.stopPropagation()` on the bookmark button to prevent the page from opening.
